title: Fix `randomize local::` giving false outside error
body:
Hi,

when trying our UVM environment, we run into issues when trying to randomize
some of our classes. I stripped down all the UVM stuff from it, so that the reproducer
is self-contained. It goes like this:

```
class dio_drive_pin_sequence #(type T_PIN_LIST);

  rand T_PIN_LIST pin_no;

endclass : dio_drive_pin_sequence


class dio_agent #(int P_PIN_COUNT, type T_PIN_LIST);

  task set_pin(T_PIN_LIST pin_no);
    dio_drive_pin_sequence#(T_PIN_LIST) seq;

    seq = new();

    // Set attributes
    if (!seq.randomize() with {pin_no == local::pin_no;})
      $error("Randomization failed.");

  endtask : set_pin

endclass : dio_agent
```

What output from that test indicates it is wrong, and what is the correct or expected output?  (Or, please make test self-checking if possible.)

```
%Error: t_with_local.sv:16:42: Illegal 'local::' outside 'randomize() with' (IEEE 1800-2023 18.7.1)
   16 |     if (!seq.randomize() with {pin_no == local::pin_no;})
      |                                          ^~~~~
        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html?v=5.042 for more assistance.
%Error: Exiting due to 1 error(s)
```

I expect verilator to compile this without error.

What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?

```
verilator --cc t_with_local.sv
```

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?  Did you try it with other simulators?

I am using 5.042. I did not try latest master. With VCS I am able to analyze the file. The UVM agent
that contains this pattern simulates without problems.

What OS and distribution are you using?

```
Linux runner4.tropic.dev.hq.sldev.cz 4.18.0-553.58.1.el8_10.x86_64 #1 SMP Thu Jun 12 14:27:07 EDT 2025 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux
```

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?

Yes, that would be appreciated. But I can't guarantee I will have time to deal with this.
